title: Property Sales
shortDescription: Buy or sell verified homes, apartments, and investment properties across Ajah and wider Lagos with a team built for fast buyer-seller introductions.
fullDescription: Sammy Realty helps property owners market, price, and close sales while giving buyers a shorter path to trusted listings. We focus on clear property details, quick viewing coordination, and direct contact with the seller so decisions can move without delay.

captions.caption: Sales support for homes and investment property in Lagos.
captions.captionFullDescription: From listing preparation to buyer follow-up, our sales process is designed to reduce friction and keep serious enquiries moving.
captions.captionShortDescription: Tell us what you want to sell or buy, and Sammy Realty will help you reach the right property contact faster.

title: Property Management
shortDescription: Keep rentals occupied, maintained, and accountable with practical management for landlords, estates, and recurring rental income.
fullDescription: Our property management service covers tenant coordination, inspection support, vacancy follow-up, and owner updates. Sammy Realty keeps the experience simple for landlords and responsive for tenants, helping each property stay attractive and income-ready.

captions.caption: Management support that protects occupancy and trust.
captions.captionFullDescription: We help landlords reduce vacancy pressure with clearer listings, fast enquiry handling, and practical maintenance coordination.
captions.captionShortDescription: A managed property should be easy to inspect, easy to rent, and easy for the owner to monitor.

title: Real Estate Consulting
shortDescription: Get practical guidance on location, pricing, rental yield, documentation, and market-fit before you buy, sell, lease, or invest.
fullDescription: Sammy Realty gives buyers, landlords, and investors clear market guidance for Ajah, Lagos, and nearby growth corridors. We keep advice action-oriented, helping you compare options and contact the right party with confidence.

captions.caption: Local real estate insight for better decisions.
captions.captionFullDescription: We help you understand demand, vacancy risk, asking-price quality, and the practical next step before committing time or money.
captions.captionShortDescription: Good real estate advice should help you act faster, not leave you with more confusion.

title: Rental & Shortlets
shortDescription: Find homes for rent and shortlet stays with simple area-based search, quick viewing, and immediate contact options.
fullDescription: For rentals and shortlets, speed matters. Sammy Realty helps users filter by location and property fit, then move directly to calls, WhatsApp enquiries, and viewing arrangements without unnecessary steps.

captions.caption: Fast rental and shortlet matching in Lagos.
captions.captionFullDescription: We prioritise availability, location clarity, and contact speed so renters and guests can move from interest to inspection quickly.
captions.captionShortDescription: Search by area, view the property, contact immediately.
